executive_summary: The app has received mixed reviews, with significant negative feedback concentrated on recent updates that degraded design and reliability. Users report that the 2020 updates made the interface messy and confusing, widgets no longer show tasks chronologically or by priority, and the app crashes frequently, especially after troubleshooting. Sync issues cause data loss across devices, and customer support is unresponsive to refund requests and cancellation queries. Pricing is a major barrier: the annual premium cost (~910 INR) is considered high, and there are no monthly or UPI payment options. Aggressive premium upgrade prompts annoy free users, and reminders/notifications malfunction. However, positive reviews highlight that the free version is functional and helps with organization, and some users appreciate the app's simplicity and features like shopping lists and widgets. Overall, the app is at risk of losing users due to these persistent issues.
main_issues: Design degradation after updates: UI complexity, jumbled lists, and loss of chronological ordering
App crashes and performance instability, including crashes after setup
Sync and data loss across devices, especially with recurrent tasks on desktop
Customer support unresponsive to refund requests and cancellation help
High premium cost (~910 INR/year) with no monthly option or UPI payment support
Aggressive premium upgrade prompts in the free version
Widget malfunction: tasks displayed by category instead of by day or priority
Reminder/notification malfunctions: wrong times, no repeat after dismissal
Intrusive pop-up ads despite notification settings off
aspect_takeaways: Design: Most criticized aspect (22.5% mentions, mean severity 0.575). Users are frustrated with post-update UI changes that broke task organization and widget functionality.
Reliability: High severity (mean 0.6) with 20% mentions. Crashes, sync failures, and data loss are recurring problems.

Price: 20% mentions, mean severity 0.4. Premium cost is a barrier, especially for students and users in developing countries. Limited payment methods (no UPI) and no monthly subscription are pain points.
Support: Only 7.5% mentions but high severity (max 4). Refund requests and cancellation queries go unanswered.
Performance: 10% mentions, mean severity 0.375. Crashes are common but not as severe as reliability issues.
Ads: Minimal mentions (2.5%) but intrusive pop-ups despite notification settings being off.
action_items: Roll back or redesign the widget to allow chronological and priority-based task display.
Improve app stability: fix crashes, especially after setup and when creating events with invites.
Enhance sync reliability across platforms, particularly for recurrent tasks and after forced email login.
Introduce a monthly subscription option and support UPI and debit cards in more countries.
Respond to customer support tickets promptly, especially refund and cancellation requests.
Reduce the frequency and intrusiveness of premium upgrade prompts.
Fix reminder and notification functionality to ensure correct times and repeat options.
Allow users to easily cancel subscriptions directly within the app.
Review recent UI changes and simplify the interface to restore ease of use.
Investigate and fix the issue where tasks shuffle to top upon reopening the app.
evidence_quotes: I have been begging for a refund from this app for over a month and nobody is replying me
Very costly for the premium version (approx Indian Rupees 910 per year).
